title: Allow Send Email automation trigger to apply to subitem status change
excerpt: Current state does not allow me to run the Send email automation on subitem status changes. It only will trigger an email to be sent when the status changes on a parent item. I would like to be able to run this automatio…

posts.author: kristinjensen (Kristin Jensen)
posts.cookedHtml: Current state does not allow me to run the Send email automation on subitem status changes. It only will trigger an email to be sent when the status changes on a parent item. I would like to be able to run this automation when the status changes on a subitem.

posts.author: Xtellig (Xtellig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Kristin,

We’ve launched Easy Automate, the one app for multiple automation features!

recently introduced Email Automation feature is exactly what you’ve been looking for - with full support for both item and subitem data.

The best part? We offer a Free Plan so you can start exploring right away without commitment.

You can checkout our app here via marketplace
